title: Remote monitoring platform launched
body: The company offers predictive maintenance service and remote monitoring for equipment.

title: Factory capacity expansion
body: The company added a new production line for standard components.

title: Integrated solution business
body: Management reports growth in system solution and lifecycle service contracts.

title: Cost reduction project
body: Automation reduced material waste in the existing workshop.

title: Industrial internet platform
body: A cloud platform service connects customer equipment and delivers data services.

title: 普通产品销售
body: 公司继续销售标准产品，未披露服务化升级。

title: 解决方案收入增长
body: 公司提供一体化解决方案和运维服务。

title: Inventory optimization
body: The firm improved inventory turnover in its existing product business.

title: Predictive service rollout
body: Predictive maintenance and performance advisory services were introduced.

title: New workshop
body: A new workshop increased output of low-end parts.

title: 平台服务
body: 企业上线工业互联网平台服务，支持客户远程监控。

title: Price competition
body: The company faced lower margins in commodity products.
